title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Google DeepMind and the University of Cambridge are using AI tools including AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to accelerate antibiotic discovery against drug-resistant bacteria by compressing analysis from years to minutes. The work targets structural biology insights to combat antimicrobial resistance.
